item.title: No Starch Press - The LEGO Neighborhood Book 2: Build Your Own Town!
item.description: There’s a deal No Starch Press - The LEGO Neighborhood Book 2: Build Your Own Town! here: ℹ️: Lego Quartiere Book 2, Costruisci la tua città! Costruisci la tua città! 🛒 Buy it now!!
